zh.lifeSummary: 當William Mumford於1613年3月13日出生在英國倫敦時，他的父親William Mumford27歲，母親Mrs. William Mumford23歲。他於1631年9月29日與Margaret Peart在英國格盧斯特斯爾阿爾斯同結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1643年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特紐波特享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Mumford于1613年3月13日出生在英国倫敦时，他的父亲William Mumford27岁，母亲Mrs. William Mumford23岁。他于1631年9月29日与Margaret Peart在英国格盧斯特斯爾阿爾斯同结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1643年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特紐波特享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mumford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Mountford
meanings: English (Staffordshire; of Norman origin): habitational name from Montfort-sur-Risle (Eure) or from one or other of various places called Montfort in France (from Old French mont ‘hill’ + fort ‘fortress’). Early forms of this name are indistinguishable from those of Mundford in Norfolk, perhaps indicating an alternative habitational name (see Munford ).

History: A Norman bearer of this name, from Montfort-sur-Risle in Eure, near Brionne, accompanied William the Conqueror in his invasion of England in 1066. Simon de Montfort, 6th Earl of Leicester, led a rebellion against Henry III (1216–1272).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: Providence Founded
historicEvents.description: In 1636 Providence is founded as a settlement for Rhode Island by Roger Williams

historicEvents.title: First Baptist Church
historicEvents.description: Roger Williams establishes the First Baptist Church of Rhode Island in Providence during 1638.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When William Mumford was born on 13 March 1613, in London, England, his father, William Mumford, was 27 and his mother, Mrs. William Mumford, was 23. He married Margaret Peart on 29 September 1631, in Alstone, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1643, in Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Mumford est né le 13 mars 1613, à Londres, Angleterre, son père, William Mumford, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mrs. William Mumford, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Peart le 29 septembre 1631, à Alstone, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1643, à Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 30 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: William Mumford(이)가 1613년 3월 13일 영국 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Mumford(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. William Mumford(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1631년 9월 29일 영국 그루스스터실르 알스톤에서 Margaret Peart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1643년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 뉴포트 뉴포트에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Mumford родился 13 марта 1613 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, его отцу по имени William Mumford было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. William Mumford, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Peart 29 сентября 1631 г. в местности алстоун, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1643 г. в местности нюпорт, нюпорт, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 30 лет.
